description.full: Chat with the License Violation Data Analyzer Agent to request license and company usage reports, review possible license violation signals, and submit analyst feedback.

commands.title: help
commands.description: Show examples of supported license analysis requests.

commands.title: history
commands.description: Show recent report requests and bot memory for the current user.

commands.title: status
commands.description: Check the status of a queued license investigation report.

commands.title: license
commands.description: Request a license usage investigation by license ID.

commands.title: company
commands.description: Request a license usage investigation by company name.

commands.title: feedback
commands.description: Record reviewer feedback on a report finding.
